sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109601" key="u(poxu/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπο-χύνω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀφθαλμούς,</foreign> <sense id="n109601.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cause cataract in</tr_> the eyes, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
